PreToolUse.command: if command -v context-mode >/dev/null 2>&1; then context-mode hook vscode-copilot pretooluse; fi

PostToolUse.command: if command -v context-mode >/dev/null 2>&1; then context-mode hook vscode-copilot posttooluse; fi

SessionStart.command: if command -v context-mode >/dev/null 2>&1; then context-mode hook vscode-copilot sessionstart; fi
